vulnerablePopulations: Individuals with obesity or metabolic syndrome
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis based on skin lesions, SBD guidelines, biopsy in atypical cases

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: SBD clinical criteria, dermoscopy when available
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Topical corticosteroids via SUS, phototherapy (limited access), biologics (adalimumab, ustekinumab) via judicial demand for severe cases
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited phototherapy access, biologics require judicial process, psychosocial impact/stigma, dermatologist shortage in rural areas
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: SBD guidelines, topical treatments via SUS, some biologics via high-cost medication program
